name: whatsapp-ideep
description: iDeep WhatsApp Bot API - Read chats, send messages by contact NAME (fuzzy matched), manage auto-reply assistant via WhatsApp. Supports natural language contact resolution.

tools.name: whatsapp_smart_send
tools.description: PREFERRED: Send a WhatsApp message using contact NAME (fuzzy matched) or phone number. Handles partial names: 'Masoud Nayebi' will match 'Masoud Nayebi-Tech Assistant'. Can also send as iDeep AI Assistant.

to.description: Contact name OR phone number. Fuzzy matched. Examples: 'Masoud Nayebi', 'Mom', '989123456789'

as_assistant.description: If true, sends as iDeep AI Assistant with name prefix. Default: false

tools.name: whatsapp_smart_search
tools.description: PREFERRED: Search WhatsApp messages with natural language query and optional contact name (fuzzy matched). Use for queries like 'when was my date with Masoud?' or 'what did Mom say about dinner?'

query.description: What to search for (e.g., 'date with Masoud', 'meeting tomorrow', 'flight booking')

contact.description: Contact name to filter by (fuzzy matched). E.g., 'Masoud Nayebi' matches 'Masoud Nayebi-Tech Assistant'

tools.name: whatsapp_resolve_contact
tools.description: Resolve a contact name to phone number using fuzzy matching. Returns ranked matches with confidence scores. Use when you need to confirm which contact the user means.

name.description: Contact name to look up (fuzzy matched). E.g., 'Masoud' or 'Masoud Nayebi'

tools.name: whatsapp_recent_messages
tools.description: Get the most recent incoming WhatsApp messages. Quick way to check 'what's new on WhatsApp?'

count.description: Number of recent messages to return. Default: 10

tools.name: whatsapp_get_status
tools.description: Get WhatsApp connection status and service health

tools.name: whatsapp_get_chats
tools.description: Get all recent WhatsApp chats with last message preview

tools.name: whatsapp_send_message_direct
tools.description: Send a WhatsApp message directly to a phone number (use whatsapp_smart_send instead if you have a contact name)

phone.description: Phone number with country code, no + (e.g., 989123456789)

tools.name: whatsapp_reply_as_assistant
tools.description: Send a reply as iDeep AI Assistant on behalf of the user. Use when user asks to reply to someone as their assistant.

context.description: Context about why this reply is being sent

tools.name: whatsapp_configure_assistant
tools.description: Enable/disable auto-reply and configure the iDeep AI Assistant behavior

assistant_name.description: Name of the assistant (default: iDeep AI)
